name: Folders
summary: Provides access to all standard Grasshopper file and folder locations.

methods.name: ShowFolderInExplorer
methods.summary: Open a specific folder in Windows Explorer.

properties.name: AppDataFolder
properties.summary: Gets the appdata folder for Grasshopper.

properties.name: AssemblyFolders
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the directories from which GHA assemblies are loaded. Note: this is not the same as all folders from which GHA files were loaded at startup. This list includes the default Grasshopper folders, custom GHA folders and the locations provided by Rhino.Runtime.HostUtils.GetAssemblySearchPaths(). Folders which do not contain GHA files are omitted, as are duplicate entries.

properties.name: AutoSaveFolder
properties.summary: Gets the directory in windows ApplicationData that contains the Grasshopper autosave files.

properties.name: ClusterFolders
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the directories from which GHCLUSTER files are loaded. GHUSER files are loaded from subfolders as well.

properties.name: CursorFolder
properties.summary: Gets the directory that contains the cursor files that ship with Grasshopper.

properties.name: CustomAssemblyFolders
properties.summary: Gets or sets all custom assembly folders.

properties.name: DefaultAssemblyFolder
properties.summary: Gets the standard directory in windows ApplicationData that contains 3rd party GHA files.

properties.name: DefaultClusterFolder
properties.summary: Gets the standard directory in windows ApplicationData that contains GHCLUSTER files.

properties.name: DefaultTemplateFolder
properties.summary: Gets the standard directory in windows ApplicationData that contains template files.

properties.name: DefaultUserObjectFolder
properties.summary: Gets the standard directory in windows ApplicationData that contains GHUSER files.

properties.name: Desktop
properties.summary: Gets the desktop directory of the current user profile.

properties.name: DownloaderApplication
properties.summary: Gets the location where the Downloader.exe should be. If the application is not present, null is returned.

properties.name: FileViewerApplication
properties.summary: Gets the location where the FileViewer.exe should be. If the application is not present, null is returned.

properties.name: IconFolder
properties.summary: Gets the directory that contains the icon files that ship with Grasshopper.

properties.name: ImageStitcherApplication
properties.summary: Gets the location where the ImageStitcher.exe should be. If the application is not present, null is returned.

properties.name: PluginFolder
properties.summary: Gets the directory that contains the Grasshopper.dll file.

properties.name: SDKDownloaderApplication
properties.summary: Gets the location where the SDKDownloader.exe should be. If the application is not present, null is returned.

properties.name: SettingsFolder
properties.summary: Gets the folder into which all Grasshopper settings are stored. This folder might not exist until some settings are actually saved.

properties.name: TemplateFolders
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the directories from which template files are loaded. Templates are not loaded from subfolders.

properties.name: ToolsFolder
properties.summary: Gets the directory that contains the additional executables that ship with Grasshopper.

properties.name: TutorialFiles
properties.summary: Gets an array of all the tutorial files. This includes all the files with the *.gh or *.ghx extension in the Tutorials folder. Subfolders are not traversed.

properties.name: TutorialFolder
properties.summary: Gets the directory that contains the tutorial files that ship with Grasshopper.

properties.name: UserObjectFolders
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the directories from which GHUSER files are loaded. GHUSER files are loaded from subfolders as well.

properties.name: VersionHistoryFile
properties.summary: Gets the text file location where Grasshopper will save the latest version information.

properties.name: VersionHistoryUrl
properties.summary: Gets the url of the version history data.
